channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-5540] crash in lnet_parse_networks
item.description:
I had a borken lnet configuration :

  1. cat /etc/modprobe.d/Lustre
    options lnet accept_port=50 ip2nets=o2ib1(ib0)

I kicked off acceptance, and it never got the fs mounted.

crash> bt
PID: 15442 TASK: ffff8803e38e0aa0 CPU: 5 COMMAND: "modprobe"

Amir, thanks for the patch, I have changed it to "blocker" because we need this fixed for 2.7

Thanks Stephen. I see the build has completed successfully and is now in review.

Presumably you'll grab this, and try it out, once it has completed autotesting?

~ jfc.

Thanks Amir! This is a clearly incorrect mode of failure.

John - this was master branch, last successful build the day before I filed. The Environment section of the report should point you to the commit id if needed.
